hindi: ॐ जय शिव ओंकारा, स्वामी जय शिव ओंकारा। ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, सदाशिव, अर्द्धांगी धारा॥
english: Om, victory to Shiva, Lord Omkara; Brahma, Vishnu and Sadashiva are his three aspects, with Ardhangi (Parvati) by his side
roman: Om Jai Shiv Omkara, Swami Jai Shiv Omkara, Brahma Vishnu Sadashiv Ardhangi Dhara

hindi: एकानन चतुरानन पञ्चानन राजे। हंसासन गरुड़ासन वृषवाहन साजे॥
english: As Brahma he has one face, as Vishnu four, as Shiva five; seated on swan, eagle and bull respectively
roman: Ekaanan Chaturanan Panchanan Raje, Hansaasan Garudaasan Vrishvahan Saaje

hindi: दो भुज चार चतुर्भुज दसभुज अति सोहे। त्रिगुण रूप निरखते त्रिभुवन जन मोहे॥
english: His two, four and ten arms are supremely beautiful; seeing his three-natured form all three worlds are enchanted
roman: Do Bhuj Char Chaturbhuj Dasbhuj Ati Sohe, Trigun Roop Nirakhate Tribhuvan Jan Mohe

hindi: अक्षमाला वनमाला मुंडमाला धारी। त्रिपुरारी कंसारी कर माला धारी॥
english: He wears rosary, forest garland and skull garland; destroyer of Tripura, with a garland of hands
roman: Akshmala Vanmala Mundmala Dhari, Tripurari Kansari Kar Mala Dhari

hindi: श्वेताम्बर पीताम्बर बाघम्बर अंगे। सनकादिक गरुड़ादिक भूतादिक संगे॥
english: His body is draped in white, yellow and tiger-skin garments; attended by Sanaka, Garuda, and ghosts
roman: Shvetambar Pitambar Baghambar Ange, Sankadik Garunadik Bhootadik Sange

hindi: कर के मध्य कमण्डलु, चक्र, त्रिशूल धर्ता। जगकर्ता जगहर्ता जगपालन कर्ता॥
english: He holds kamandalu, chakra and trident in his hands; creator, destroyer and sustainer of the world
roman: Kar Ke Madhya Kamandalu Chakra Trishul Dharta, Jagkarta Jagharta Jagpalan Karta

hindi: ब्रह्मा विष्णु सदाशिव जानत अविवेका। प्रणवाक्षर के मध्ये ये तीनो एका॥
english: Brahma, Vishnu and Sadashiva are one in the Pranava (Om); the three are truly one
roman: Brahma Vishnu Sadashiv Jaanat Aviveka, Pranavakshar Ke Madhye Ye Teeno Eka

hindi: काशी में विराजे विश्वनाथ, नंदी ब्रह्मचारी। नित उठ दर्शन पावत, महिमा अति भारी॥
english: Lord Vishwanath dwells in Kashi with celibate Nandi; those who rise daily and take darshan receive immense grace
roman: Kashi Mein Viraaje Vishwanath Nandi Brahmachari, Nit Uth Darshan Paavat Mahima Ati Bhaari

hindi: त्रिगुण स्वामी जी की आरती जो कोई नर गावे। कहत शिवानंद स्वामी, मनवांछित फल पावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of the three-natured Lord; says Shivananda Swami, attains all desired fruits
roman: Trigunswami Ji Ki Aarti Jo Koi Nar Gaave, Kahat Shivanand Swami Manvanchit Phal Paave

hindi: ॐ जय शिव ओंकारा, स्वामी जय शिव ओंकारा॥
roman: Om Jai Shiv Omkara, Swami Jai Shiv Omkara
